title: EMPLOYABILITY PROGRAM - 211info
text: ARC LANE COUNTY EMPLOYABILITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides employment services to help adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities determine their preferences, interests, and support needs related to integrated employment within the community. 4181 E Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Adults with intellectual or developmental disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 343-5256 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 343-5256 Tricia Miller [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Services: Disability Related Center Based Employment Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - CARES FOOD PANTRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COMMUNITY CONNECTORS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILIES CONNECTED/FAMILIAS EN CONEXION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STEPPING OUT REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - THE ARC OF LANE COUNTY SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - ESTEAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ARC LANE COUNTY
